prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training - maximize carbohydrate intake with proper pre/during/post-workout nutrition timing

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers a full 24-hour period with at least 4 distinct meals/snacks
Includes specific pre-workout, during-workout, and post-workout nutrition recommendations with timing
Emphasizes high carbohydrate content appropriate for endurance athlete (approximately 8-10g per kg body weight daily)
Meal plan is compact and concise (single day format, minimal elaboration)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a professional endurance athlete (marathon runner) who requires high carbohydrate intake and specific timing around training sessions, including pre-workout, during-workout, and post-workout nutrition

prompt_inputs.goal: Muscle gain and strength improvement for weightlifting

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers 1 full day with at least 4 meals/snacks
Protein distributed across meals (minimum 25g per meal) from vegetarian sources excluding peanuts
Total daily protein meets ~1.6-2.2g per kg body weight (~136-187g)
Includes timing considerations for pre/post-workout nutrition
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength-based athlete (weightlifter) who needs high protein distribution across meals and specific micronutrient timing, with dietary restrictions (e.g., vegetarian or food allergies) that require alternative protein sources
